title: tragopogon malikus
intro: Tragopogon malikus, also known as salsify or goat's beard, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its high content of inulin, a prebiotic fiber that promotes gut health. The health benefits of Tragopogon malikus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and support the growth of beneficial gut bacteria. Tragopogon malikus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root powder for use in herbal remedies, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively studied in modern medicine.
